programs.title: Earn with ChatGPT Plus
programs.guidelines:
ChatGPT Plus is a subscription service by OpenAI offering faster responses, priority access during peak times, and access to the latest models like GPT-4. As an affiliate, you can promote this subscription to tech enthusiasts, professionals, students, and businesses. Every time someone subscribes through your link, you earn a commission. Creative and educational campaigns often perform best.
Refer users to ChatGPT Plus using your unique affiliate link. Ensure users sign up and complete a payment for the Plus plan. You must not use spam or misleading promotions. Only valid, unique sign-ups from real users will be counted. Monthly payouts are made based on confirmed subscriptions.
programs.details: Refer users to ChatGPT Plus using your unique affiliate link.
cons: May not appeal to non-tech users
